notes:
MILESTONE pass: Part 1 (floating-mascot, crit1) is DONE + audit-passed (both _build and _test audits pass); Strike settled the queue. Director armed Part 2 (hat-bubble, crit2): research->plan->build->test (+auto AUDIT on build and test). Next milestone pass arms Part 3 (floating-card-panel, crit3), then P4 polish, then P5 screenshot-gate (only after P1-P4 all audit-passed -- shots must show FINAL pixels), then P5b MANDATORY OPUS visual-review (LAST).

Part 2 gap (grounded in Cheffy.astro): the SVG already wires FOUR states via #cheffy[data-state=idle|attention|dialogue|processing] mapping 3 data-expr eye groups (neutral/excited/thinking) + 3 data-mouth shapes + the .cheffy-dot; a cheffy-blink idle keyframe and a reduced-motion sweep already exist. The real crit2 gaps to build: (1) SVG sizing to ~56-64px, (2) circular .cheffy-toggle bubble chrome (bg/shadow/hover/press) from existing --color-* tokens, (3) a transform-based idle float/bob keyframe alongside blink, both reduced-motion-gated, (4) confirm the four states read visually distinct, (5) notif dot correct in attention. NOTE: there is NO 'sleepy' state -- the bootstrap paraphrase was loose; the four expression states = the four data-state values (idle/attention/dialogue/processing).

TAGGING POLICY (DoD override, unchanged): P2 BUILD is deliberately NOT --criterion-tagged. Visual criteria 1-4 are signed off ONLY by the Opus 5b verdict -- crit2 stays 'pending' through its Sonnet build/test audits and is flipped to 'done' by the Director at sign-off (direct dod_progress write) ONLY after notes/cheffy-visual-review.md records PASS for crit2 at all 3 breakpoints. reconcile-dod handles only crit5 (P5 build) and crit5b (P5b review).

Behavior (state machine/dialogue/calendar/ICS/checklist/notifications) is already built and working -- every rung is PRESENTATION-ONLY; do NOT rebuild or touch behavior JS.
